product_updates.title: The AI skills gap is here, says AI company, and power users are pulling ahead
product_updates.content: Anthropic finds AI isn’t replacing jobs yet, but early data shows growing inequality as experienced users gain an edge, raising concerns about future displacement and workforce divides.

product_updates.title: Google unveils TurboQuant, a new AI memory compression algorithm — and yes, the internet is calling it ‘Pied Piper’
product_updates.content: Google’s TurboQuant has the internet joking about Pied Piper from HBO's "Silicon Valley." The compression algorithm promises to shrink AI’s “working memory” by up to 6x, but it’s still just a lab experiment for now.

product_updates.title: Melania Trump wants a robot to homeschool your child
product_updates.content: The first lady sees AI and robotics playing a prominent role in the future of American education.

product_updates.title: Bernie Sanders and AOC propose a ban on data center construction
product_updates.content: Senator Bernie Sanders and Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez introduced companion legislation to halt construction on new data centers until Congress passes comprehensive AI regulation.

product_updates.title: Google launches Lyria 3 Pro music generation model
product_updates.content: Google is launching Lyria 3 Pro, an upgraded music model that generates longer, more customizable tracks, as it expands AI music tools across Gemini, enterprise products, and other services.

product_updates.title: Reddit takes on the bots with new ‘human verification’ requirements for fishy behavior
product_updates.content: Reddit will require suspected automated accounts to verify they’re human, as it ramps up efforts to curb bot-driven spam and manipulation.

product_updates.title: Harvey confirms $11B valuation: Sequoia triples down
product_updates.content: Investors like Sequoia, Andreessen Horowitz, Kleiner Perkins, and Elad Gil can't get enough of AI legal tech startup Harvey.

product_updates.title: Granola raises $125M, hits $1.5B valuation as it expands from meeting notetaker to enterprise AI app
product_updates.content: Granola's valuation jumped from $250 million to $1.5 billion with this round, and it has added more support for AI agents after users previously complained.

product_updates.title: Meta launches new initiative to support entrepreneurship, drive AI adoption
product_updates.content: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg said in a memo to staff that small businesses have always been a big part of the company's business model, and that while tens of millions of entrepreneurs already use its platforms to grow and connect with customers, the company wants to do more in the space.

product_updates.title: Meta turns to AI to make shopping easier on Instagram and Facebook
product_updates.content: Meta is using generative AI to provide more product and brand information to consumers when they're shopping in its apps.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Roundtables: The Next Era of Space Exploration
technical_breakthroughs.content: Listen to the session or watch below Whether it’s the race to find life on Mars, the campaign to outsmart killer asteroids, or the quest to make the moon a permanent home to astronauts, scientists’ efforts in space can tell us more about where humanity is headed. This subscriber-only discussion e…

technical_breakthroughs.title: Lyria 3 Pro: Create longer tracks in more
technical_breakthroughs.content: Introducing Lyria 3 Pro, which unlocks longer tracks with structural awareness. We’re also bringing Lyria to more Google products and surfaces.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Google bumps up Q Day deadline to 2029, far sooner than previously thought
technical_breakthroughs.content: Company warns entire industry to move off RSA and EC more quickly.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Why this battery company is pivoting to AI
technical_breakthroughs.content: Qichao Hu doesn’t mince words about how he sees the state of the battery industry. “Almost every Western battery company has either died or is going to die. It’s kind of the reality,” he says. Hu is the CEO of SES AI, a Massachusetts-based battery company. It once had aims of making huge amounts of…

technical_breakthroughs.title: This startup wants to change how mathematicians do math
technical_breakthroughs.content: Axiom Math, a startup based in Palo Alto, California, has released a free new AI tool for mathematicians, designed to discover mathematical patterns that could unlock solutions to long-standing problems. The tool, called Axplorer, is a redesign of an existing one called PatternBoost that François…

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: reawakening frozen brains, and the AI Hype Index returns
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. technical_breakthroughs.title: Agentic commerce runs on truth and context
technical_breakthroughs.content: Imagine telling a digital agent, “Use my points and book a family trip to Italy. Keep it within budget, pick hotels we’ve liked before, and handle the details.” Instead of returning a list of links, the agent assembles an itinerary and executes the purchase. That shift, from assistance to executi…

technical_breakthroughs.title: The AI Hype Index: AI goes to war
technical_breakthroughs.content: AI is at war. Anthropic and the Pentagon feuded over how to weaponize Anthropic’s AI model Claude; then OpenAI swept the Pentagon off its feet with an “opportunistic and sloppy” deal. Users quit ChatGPT in droves. People marched through London in the biggest protest against AI to date. If you’re …
